name: Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual tracking causes compliance issues. We automate sales tax report generation instead of manual tracking.
problem_solved: Difficulty in generating accurate sales tax reports for multiple jurisdictions.

locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual tracking and reporting of sales tax obligations.
